verse_text: and a grain offering of one-tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for each male lamb, as a burnt offering of sweet aroma to the Lord.

links.context: to (2) the weekly offerings ([[EXO.20:8]]-11; Lv 23:3; [[NUM.28:9]], [[NUM.28:10]]), to (3) the monthly offerings ([[NUM.28:11]]-15), to (4) the yearly offerings ([[EXO.12:1]]-20; 23:15, 16;

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
